name: White Chocolate Chip Cookies with Macadamia Nu
recipeInstructions:
1. BLEND BUTTER, SUGARS, EGG, AND VANILLA UNTIL FLUFFY, STOPPING ONCE TO SCRAPE DOWN SIDES OF BOWL (ABOUT 1 MINUTE).
2. ADD FLOUR, BAKING SODA, AND SALT; MIX UNTIL JUST COMBINED.
3. DO NOT OVER MIX.
4. STIR IN WHITE CHOCOLATE CHUNKS AND NUTS.
5. MOULD DOUGH INTO 1/3 CUPFUL PORTIONS ONTO A LIGHTLY GREASED COOKIE SHEET, SPACING ABOUT 2 INCHES APART.
6. BAKE AT PREHEATED 375 DEGREE F (190 DEGREE C) FOR ABOUT 15 MINUTES UNTIL THE EDGES ARE LIGHTLY BROWNED.
7. COOL ON THE COOKIE SHEET FOR 3 MINUTES, THEN TRANSFER TO RACKS AND ALLOW TO COOL COMPLETELY.
8. STORE IN AN AIR-TIGHT CONTAINER. (COOKIES CAN BE PREPARED AHEAD OF TIME; THEY CAN STAY AT ROOM TEMPERATURE UNTIL READY TO SERVE OR BE KEPT IN THE REFRIGERATOR FOR UP TO 4 DAYS, OR FREEZED FOR 3 WEEKS.)
